idea-plugin.name: TODO Enhancer
idea-plugin.description:
TODO Enhancer supercharges the way you track TODOs and FIXMEs in your project.

On top of IntelliJ's built-in TODO index, it adds a dedicated tool window that understands structured metadata written directly in your comments:

  • Assignees — // TODO(@asad) fix the parser
  • Priorities — // TODO !p1 ship this first
  • Tags — // TODO #backend #perf tighten the query
  • Due dates — // TODO due:2026-07-10 finalize release notes

The tool window lets you sort and filter every TODO by type, priority, assignee, tag, or free text, and jump straight to the code with a double-click. Plain // TODO comments keep working exactly as before — metadata is entirely optional.
